title: ParaCity Espresso Cups Set of 2 with Wooden Ring, High Borosilicate Espresso Shot Glass, Clear Small Expresso Shots Cup, Espresso Accessories (Large)
features: Anti-Scalding Wooden Ring: Espresso cups set of 2 with anti-scald wooden ring. This wooden ring of espresso shot glass not only adds elegance to your expresso shots cup, it also effectively prevents heat transfer. Whether you're using this espresso accessories to hold espresso liquid from a French press or freshly heated milk froth, you won't burn your hands.

Elegant and Retro Design: The surface of the espresso cups has a delicate transparent glass texture, which combined with the elegant wooden ring design creates an attractive appearance. Enhance the visual appeal of any table when you use this espresso shot glass to serve your favorite tea, coffee, latte and more.

High Borosilicate Glass Material: The espresso cups is made of heat-resistant lead-free borosilicate glass. Borosilicate glass allows the espresso shot glass to withstand a sudden temperature difference of -20°C-150°C. You no longer have to worry about your expresso shots cup breaking due to alternating between hot and cold.

Espresso Machine Accessories: Our espresso cups set of 2 is a great coffee machine accessory that works perfectly with semi-automatic or pod machines. In fact, the espresso shot glass are small enough to fit in any machine. You can make and enjoy your coffee with the cappuccino cup.

Nice Gift: This espresso cups set of 2 comes in a beautiful box, making it the perfect gift for friends and family. NOTE: There is a slight gap between the wooden ring and the expresso shots cup to facilitate disassembly and cleaning of the expresso shots cup. To prevent the wooden ring of your espresso accessories from deforming or fading, we recommend hand washing.
